name: agent-pipeline-marketplace
description: Reusable Claude Code plugins: a multi-agent development pipeline and the Stanford STORM research method.

plugins.name: agent-pipeline
plugins.description: Planner -> Coder -> Tester -> Reviewer -> Explainer feature pipeline with a learning stage. Contract-driven (repo/task/diff/evidence) with stop rules and a hard review gate. Plus /grade-tests: mutation testing (cosmic-ray) that grades whether your suite actually asserts behaviour, with a survivor->assertion report and a baseline ratchet.

plugins.name: storm-research
plugins.description: Stanford STORM research method: 5 expert perspectives -> contradiction map -> synthesis -> peer review. Turns any topic into a sourced, reliability-scored briefing. Includes /research-feature, a repo-grounded variant that feeds the agent-pipeline /ship workflow.
